name: view_investigation_components
prompt: Create an incident investigation dashboard for the payment-api pod that's crashlooping. I want to see resolution steps, confidence scores, blast radius, and action buttons for remediation.

recorded_responses.get_pod_logs:
2024-01-15T14:30:01Z [ERROR] java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
2024-01-15T14:30:01Z [ERROR] Container killed by OOM (exit code 137)
2024-01-15T14:29:55Z [WARN] Heap usage at 95%: 486Mi/512Mi
2024-01-15T14:29:50Z [INFO] Processing batch of 50000 transactions
recorded_responses.get_firing_alerts:
FIRING: KubePodCrashLooping (critical) — Pod production/payment-api is crash-looping (12 restarts in last hour)
FIRING: KubeContainerOOMKilled (warning) — Container payment-api OOM killed 3 times in 30m
recorded_responses.plan_dashboard:
Dashboard plan: Incident Investigation — payment-api
Row 1: Confidence badge (85%), 3 metric cards (restarts, memory, alert count)
Row 2: Resolution tracker (3 steps), Blast radius (3 dependencies)
Row 3: Memory trend chart, Action button (restart deployment)
Row 4: Pod logs, Events table
recorded_responses.create_dashboard: Dashboard 'Incident Investigation — payment-api' created with resolution_tracker, confidence_badge, blast_radius, action_button, metric_cards, chart, and data_table
